title: Semantic Profiles for FORM_DATA backfill
description: Per-CURIE acceptance contract layered on top of the Wave 136b / 137a structural validators. Catches semantic confusion the structural rules cannot detect.

bad_signals.description: Substrings that must NOT appear anywhere in defs/usage. Zero tolerance — one match rejects.

good_signals.description: Substrings of which at least min_good_signals must appear across defs + usage combined.

min_good_signals.description: Minimum count of distinct good_signals matches across the entry.

required_in_definitions.description: Substrings that must appear at least once across the definitions list.

required_in_usage_examples.description: Substrings that must appear at least once in the usage_examples answer-side.

prompt_directive.description: Text injected into the drafting CLI prompt declaring the contract up front.
